title: Trump's Deportation Plan
summary: The Trump Administration has launched a large-scale deportation program, with Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) as the main agency. The goal is to deport millions of undocumented immigrants, with a target of 3,000 arrests per day.

summary: The Trump Administration has shifted its immigration enforcement tactics from targeted approaches to mass arrests, with a focus on concealing identities and using force.

title: Immigration Enforcement Tactics Shift
summary: The Trump administration has shifted its immigration enforcement tactics from targeted approaches to mass arrests, with a focus on concealing identities and using force. This shift has led to increased presence of federal agents in hospitals and immigration courthouses, making the situation more dangerous for both agents and individuals.
